# Faizyab Hussain — Full-Stack Engineer & UI Systems Architect

## About
Faizyab Hussain is a Full-Stack Engineer & UI Systems Architect based in Karachi, Pakistan. Building scalable digital systems, AI-powered web apps, and high-performance interfaces for startups and businesses worldwide.

## Quick Facts
- **Name:** Faizyab Hussain
- **Role:** Full-Stack Engineer & UI Systems Architect
- **Location:** Karachi, Pakistan (Remote Worldwide)

## Core Skills
- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3
- **Backend:** Node.js, Firebase, Supabase, REST APIs, PostgreSQL
- **Design:** Figma, UI Systems, Responsive Design, Prototyping
- **Tools:** Git, GitHub, Vercel, Netlify, Cursor, AI Tools

## Professional Experience
### Freelance Full-Stack Developer (2024 – Present)
- Shipped 10+ end-to-end web applications with 100% success rate
- Achieved 95+ Lighthouse scores across all projects
- Developed proprietary Tailwind CSS component library

### Tech Intern — Kohaq, Karachi (Aug 2025 – Sep 2025)
- Increased deployment frequency by 20% via streamlined Git workflows
- Reduced production bugs by 15% through peer code reviews

### DevWeaveX — Founder (2025 – Present)
- Open-source initiative for premium web experiences and developer tooling

## Featured Projects
### Project Slik
Modular SaaS engine automating full-stack scaffolding. React, Node.js, Firebase.

### PasteLink Pro
Secure zero-tracking text sharing platform with auto-expiry links. React, Node.js, AES-256.

### ProdSpark
Product discovery platform with AI-powered sorting and reviews. Next.js, Supabase.

### Web Template Hub
Curated ecosystem of 100+ modern, responsive web templates. HTML5, Tailwind.

### DevWeaveX
Open-source initiative for premium web experiences and developer-first tooling.

### Help Hub AI
AI-powered productivity and assistance platform. Modern AI workflows, responsive UI.

### Prepflow AI Platform
AI-powered SaaS platform for intelligent productivity workflows.

### QuizSpark AI
AI-powered quiz creation and analytics platform. OpenAI integration.

### ClinicFlow
Clinic management system with patient records and appointment scheduling.

### Faizyab Al-Quran
Digital Quran learning platform with translations and audio recitations.

## Services
- **Full-Stack Web Development** — Custom web applications with modern architecture
- **UI/UX Design** — Premium interfaces with Figma-first workflow
- **SEO & Performance** — Lighthouse 100 optimization, semantic HTML, structured data
- **AI Integration** — LLM-powered features, embeddings, automation
- **Consulting** — Architecture reviews, technical strategy, code audits

## Pricing
- **Basic (MVP Launch):** $299 — Single page, responsive, SEO
- **Professional (Growth Engine):** $599 — Up to 5 pages, 100 Lighthouse, animations
- **Enterprise (Scale Edition):** $999 — Full multi-page system, CMS, priority support

## Engineering Principles
1. Performance First — Every millisecond counts
2. Scalable Architecture — Systems designed to grow
3. Clean Maintainable Code — Readable, documented, tested
4. SEO as Infrastructure — Baked into every layer
5. User-Centered Systems — UI psychology meets engineering
6. Accessibility Standards — Semantic HTML, ARIA, WCAG compliance
